zh.lifeSummary: 當George Soule II於1639年5月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利時，他的父親George Soule40歲，母親Mary Buckett35歲。他於1664年與Deborah Thomas在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1704年5月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Soule II于1639年5月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利时，他的父亲George Soule40岁，母亲Mary Buckett35岁。他于1664年与Deborah Thomas在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1704年5月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Soule
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): of Norman origin, a variant of   Soul  .

French (Soulé): topographic name for someone who lived in a house exposed to sun, a variant of Soulier 2; or a habitational name from Soulé, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France.
History: George Soule (1600–80), one of the passengers on the Mayflower in 1620, was one of the founders of Duxbury, MA, where he became comparatively wealthy. He left eight children.

variants.name: Sowle
meanings: English: variant of   Soule  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Soul
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Soules near Saint-Lô (Manche, France).
French (mainly Manche): variant of Saoul, a nickname from saoul ‘full, satiated; drunk’, figuratively also ‘surfeited with something’.

History: The Scottish family of this name traces the name back to Ranulf de Soulis (died before 1170), a Norman knight who came to Scotland with King David I and served as his cupbearer. Sir John Soulis (died before 1310) was appointed ‘guardian of Scotland’ by John Balliol in 1301.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Soule II was born on 12 May 1639, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, George Soule, was 40 and his mother, Mary Buckett, was 35. He married Deborah Thomas in 1664, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 17 May 1704, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Soule II est né le 12 mai 1639, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Soule, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mary Buckett, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Deborah Thomas en 1664, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 17 mai 1704, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Soule II am 12. Mai 1639 in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Soule 40 und seine Mutter Mary Buckett 35. Er hat 1664 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Deborah Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Mai 1704 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Soule II è nato il il 12 maggio 1639 nel Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, George Soule, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mary Buckett, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Deborah Thomas nel 1664, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 maggio 1704, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Soule IIが1639年5月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーで生まれた時，父George Souleは40歳，母Mary Buckettは35歳であった。1664年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでDeborah Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1704年5月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで65歳で死去した。

ko.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스

ko.Dartmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 더르트모우스
ko.lifeSummary: George Soule II(이)가 1639년 5월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Soule(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Buckett(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1664년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Deborah Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1704년 5월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Soule II nasceu em 12 de maio de 1639, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, George Soule, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mary Buckett, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Deborah Thomas em 1664, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de maio de 1704, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Soule II родился 12 мая 1639 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени George Soule было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Buckett, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Deborah Thomas в 1664 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 17 мая 1704 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Soule II nació el 12 de mayo de 1639, en Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, George Soule, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mary Buckett, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Deborah Thomas en 1664, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1704, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años.
